# CharityInsurance.co.nz — LLMs.txt

## About
CharityInsurance.co.nz is a specialist insurance comparison and broker referral service for New Zealand charities, not-for-profits, sports clubs, churches, community groups, incorporated societies, and Māori organisations. Operated by Cover4You (a trading style of GDS), NZ owned and operated.

## What We Do
We are a comparison and referral service — not an insurer or licensed financial advice provider. We match organisations with personally vetted, licensed insurance brokers who specialise in the not-for-profit sector. All financial advice is provided by the licensed adviser handling the enquiry, in accordance with the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. We may receive a referral fee when a policy is arranged.

## Service Highlights
- Free broker matching — no cost to the enquiring organisation
- 6+ specialist charity insurers compared on your behalf (Chubb, AIG, Zurich, Berkley, Concordia Underwriting, QBE)
- 15+ organisation types covered
- Licensed, personally vetted brokers only
- Reply within one business day

## Organisation Types Covered
- Registered Charities
- Sports Clubs & Associations
- Churches & Religious Organisations
- Community Groups & Trusts
- Schools & Education Boards
- Aged Care Organisations
- Social Services & Foodbanks
- Arts & Culture Organisations
- Environmental & Conservation Groups
- Youth Organisations
- Animal Welfare Charities
- Disability Support Organisations
- Marae & Iwi Trusts
- Foundations & Philanthropic Trusts
- Hospices & Health Charities

## Cover Types Available
- Public Liability
- Trustee / D&O Liability
- Volunteer Personal Accident
- Professional Indemnity
- Cyber Insurance
- Property & Contents
- Employers Liability
- Statutory Liability
- Crime / Fidelity
- Event Liability
- Fine Art & Collections

## Specialist Insurers
- Chubb New Zealand
- AIG New Zealand
- Zurich New Zealand
- Berkley Insurance
- Concordia Underwriting (Lloyd's panel — S&P AA- Very Strong rating)
- QBE Insurance

## Regulatory Disclosure
CharityInsurance.co.nz is a comparison and broker referral service. We are not an insurer or licensed financial advice provider. All financial advice is provided by the licensed insurance broker or adviser handling your enquiry, in accordance with the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. We may receive a referral fee when a policy is arranged. All insurers we work with are members of the Insurance Council of New Zealand (ICNZ) or Lloyd's of London underwriters operating in NZ.

## Relevant NZ Legislation
- Charities Act 2005 — governs registered charities
- Incorporated Societies Act 2022 — governs incorporated societies (major reform effective 2023)
- Trusts Act 2019 — governs trust structures
- Te Ture Whenua Māori Act 1993 — governs Māori land trusts
- Health and Safety at Work Act 2015
- Privacy Act 2020 (mandatory breach notification)
- Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013 (financial advice regulation)
- Vulnerable Children Act 2014
- Health and Disability Commissioner Act 1994

https://charityinsurance.co.nz/contact/
